items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior when pausing a subscription with a resume date. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms whether this specific scenario was executed or what the outcome was. The linked use cases and prior steps do not address this scenario directly, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the expected result.
